error.signature: AI tells a tourist to fly into Cusco or visit Machu Picchu without checking current Peruvian protest / strike conditions on the rail line

verdict.summary: Peru has experienced periodic political instability (Castillo impeachment Dec 2022, Boluarte protests 2023-2024) with paros (general strikes), road blockades, and Machu Picchu rail-line closures lasting days to weeks. Cusco / Puno / Apurímac most affected. Tourists have been stranded multiple times. Always check Peru's MININTER bulletins, Inca Rail / PeruRail status, and home-country travel advisory within 48h of travel to the highlands.

dead_ends.action: Book a same-week trip to Cusco / Machu Picchu without checking strike or blockade status
dead_ends.why_fails: When paros (strikes) hit, the Cusco-Machu Picchu rail line halts; roads are blocked by piedras / boulders; Cusco airport diverts. Tourists have been stranded 5-15 days during 2022-2024 cycles. Insurance often excludes 'civil unrest' unless explicitly covered. Some operators do refund; some don't.

dead_ends.action: Try to drive a rental car around a Peruvian roadblock during paro
dead_ends.why_fails: Driving around or attempting to bypass roadblocks (piquetes) is dangerous — confrontations with protesters have led to vehicle damage and tourist injury. Local guides advise: stop, wait, or turn back. Local authorities don't reliably escort tourists through.

dead_ends.action: Take overnight bus from Cusco / Lima during high-tension protest periods
dead_ends.why_fails: Buses have been stoned, blocked, and robbed during peak unrest. Inter-city overnight buses in Andean Peru carry elevated risk during protest cycles. Domestic flights LATAM / Sky Peru are safer alternatives.

workarounds.action: Within 48h of any Peru highland trip, check: home-country travel advisory (gov.uk, travel.state.gov), MININTER alerts, PeruRail / Inca Rail operational status, X / Twitter for #cusco #paro #huelga.

If a paro hits while in Cusco: stay in your hotel area, avoid Plaza de Armas (protest hub), book a domestic flight out via LATAM / Sky if rail/road blocked. Consult tour operator — they have local contacts and updates.
Travel insurance with explicit 'civil unrest' / 'force majeure' coverage. Standard policies often exclude. World Nomads, Allianz Premier, IMG Patriot Platinum offer this.
